title: Sweet Pungent Italian Cheese Ravioli
description: A light and romantic Italian dish featuring Dutch stroop and a blend of Italian cheeses, cooked to perfection in a clay pot.
instructions: Preheat the clay pot in the oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Combine the ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, and Dutch stroop in a bowl and mix well.
Add the chopped parsley and eggs to the cheese mixture and stir until smooth.
In a separate bowl, combine the flour and salt.
Gradually add the flour mixture to the cheese mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to a thin sheet and use a cookie cutter to cut out circles.
Place a spoonful of the cheese mixture in the center of each dough circle and fold the dough over to form a ravioli.
Place the ravioli in the preheated clay pot and drizzle with olive oil.
Cover the clay pot with a lid and bake for 20 minutes.
Serve the ravioli hot and enjoy.
